B_run3.content: Encoding/decoding mismatches: Always use UTF-8 for encoding/decoding text. If data was encoded with encode('utf-8'), decode with decode('utf-8'), not latin-1. When reading files, specify encoding='utf-8' explicitly.
B_run3.action: Always use UTF-8 for encoding/decoding text. If data was encoded with encode('utf-8'), decode with decode('utf-8'), not latin-1. When reading files, specify encoding='utf-8' explicitly.

B_run3.content: Terminal command failure: When running terminal commands, always check exit codes and handle errors: {"output": "Success", "exit_code": 0, "error": null}
B_run3.action: When running terminal commands, always check exit codes and handle errors: {"output": "Success", "exit_code": 0, "error": null}

C_run3.content: Missing file/directory: Before reading/operating on a file, verify it exists: 'test -f path' or 'os.path.exists()'. Use ls or find to discover correct path if the expected path doesn't exist.
C_run3.action: Before reading/operating on a file, verify it exists: 'test -f path' or 'os.path.exists()'. Use ls or find to discover correct path if the expected path doesn't exist.

C_run3.content: search_files failure: When using search_files, verify preconditions and handle errors properly
C_run3.action: When using search_files, verify preconditions and handle errors properly

C_run3.content: Algorithm termination: When implementing binary search: return -1 when lo > hi (target not in array). Do NOT recurse in the not-found branch — that causes infinite recursion.
C_run3.action: When implementing binary search: return -1 when lo > hi (target not in array). Do NOT recurse in the not-found branch — that causes infinite recursion.

C_run3.content: Thread safety / race condition: When multiple threads access shared data, always use threading.Lock. Acquire lock before all reads AND writes. Release in finally block or use 'with lock:'.
C_run3.action: When multiple threads access shared data, always use threading.Lock. Acquire lock before all reads AND writes. Release in finally block or use 'with lock:'.

C_run3.content: Terminal command failure: When running terminal commands, always check exit codes and handle errors: {"output": "coro1 done\ncoro2 done\nSuccess", "exit_code": 0, "error": null}
C_run3.action: When running terminal commands, always check exit codes and handle errors: {"output": "coro1 done\ncoro2 done\nSuccess", "exit_code": 0, "error": null}

C_run3.content: File read failure: When reading files, verify existence first and handle missing files gracefully
C_run3.action: When reading files, verify existence first and handle missing files gracefully

C_run3.content: File permission issues: When getting 'Permission denied': check file ownership with ls -la, use chmod +x for scripts, or prefix with sudo. If reading config files, check if they exist first.
C_run3.action: When getting 'Permission denied': check file ownership with ls -la, use chmod +x for scripts, or prefix with sudo. If reading config files, check if they exist first.

C_run3.content: Binary serialization format: struct.pack and struct.unpack must use the same format string. 'I' = unsigned int (4 bytes), 'Q' = unsigned long long (8 bytes). Check both sides when serializing across platforms.
C_run3.action: struct.pack and struct.unpack must use the same format string. 'I' = unsigned int (4 bytes), 'Q' = unsigned long long (8 bytes). Check both sides when serializing across platforms.
